expectations.text: The workflow gathers codebase context through parallel code-explorer agents and asks each for 5-10 key files with reasons.
expectations.evidence: Exploration summary has 7 code-explorer/agent/lens markers. Found 37 source/file mentions in exploration summary.

expectations.text: The workflow identifies security, retention, permissions, and compliance gaps and interviews the user one question at a time.
expectations.evidence: Interview log has 24 question markers, 38 recommendation/assumption markers, sequential order=True.

expectations.text: The workflow researches official security, privacy, platform, or framework guidance before recommending decisions.
expectations.evidence: Research summary has 16 links, 104 lines, official-source marker=True.

expectations.text: The PRD contains an extensive numbered user-story list covering primary, edge, admin, compliance, and error-state scenarios.
expectations.evidence: Found 24 numbered user stories; coverage={'admin': True, 'compliance': True, 'error|fail|denied|unauthorized': True, 'role|permission|access': True}.

expectations.text: Testing decisions focus on external behavior and cite similar codebase test patterns where available.
expectations.evidence: Testing section external-behavior marker=True, modules/surfaces=True, prior-art marker=True.

workarounds: Offline benchmark: real GitHub issue creation was intentionally replaced by saved issue title/body and intended gh issue create command.
